title: Decide T-Deck 16 MB flash partition layout
description: Why this exists: LilyGO/Meshtastic sources identify the T-Deck as a 16 MB flash board, but the current Zephyr DTS keeps small 1 MB image slots and tiny storage, which may not fit BLE/LVGL/UI firmware or filesystem assets. What needs to be done: define a T-Deck partition layout for bootloader, image slots/OTA, NVS/LittleFS, logs/assets, and factory/debug needs. Acceptance criteria: generated partition map uses the available flash intentionally; image slot sizes are justified by measured firmware sizes; storage needs for UI/assets/config are documented; bootloader/flashing compatibility is verified or split into a hardware smoke blocker.
notes:
Build/review evidence: EC2 Zephyr build passed for west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway_partitions after applying the T-Deck 16 MiB partition patch. Generated config: CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_SOC_ESP32S3_WROOM_N16R8=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE_16MB=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE="16MB". Generated zephyr.dts: flash0 reg <0x0 0x1000000>, zephyr,code-partition=&slot0_partition, partitions boot 0x0+0x10000, slot0 0x10000+0x400000, slot1 0x410000+0x400000, scratch 0x810000+0x80000, storage 0x890000+0x400000, assets 0xc90000+0x300000, logs 0xf90000+0x70000. Memory: FLASH 213996 B / 16776960 B (1.28%), IRAM 51484 B / 329 KiB, DRAM 92552 B / 313 KiB, IROM 110986 B / 16 MiB, DROM 148460 B / 16 MiB; zephyr.bin 213996 B / 209 KiB. Three final codex review passes over staged/unstaged/untracked changes found no discrete introduced bugs; earlier P1 8 MiB flash0 mismatch was fixed. Physical flash/boot validation remains split to child project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.14.1 and blocks closure.
EC2 build evidence for corrected T-Deck 16 MiB partition layout: launched temporary t3.medium in us-east-2a, attached Zephyr cache vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58, applied local patch on origin/main aa216515, ran west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway_partitions_noccache -- -DUSE_CCACHE=0. Build linked successfully; post-build grep evidence command captured generated config: CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_FLASH_BASE_ADDRESS=0x0, CONFIG_SOC_ESP32S3_WROOM_N16R8=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE_16MB=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE="16MB", CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y. Generated zephyr.dts contains flash@0 plus partition@0, @10000, @410000, @810000, @890000, @c90000, and @f90000. Memory/link evidence: FLASH 213996 B / 16776960 B (1.28%), IRAM 51484 B / 329 KB, DRAM 92552 B / 313 KB, IROM 110986 B / 16 MB, DROM 148460 B / 16 MB; zephyr.bin 213996 bytes (~209 KiB), zephyr.elf 5.4 MiB. Builder cleanup complete: instance i-0e4773bb866ad4fee terminated, EBS volume returned available, temporary SG sg-06d8d1bfd209013bb and key lichen-tdeck-partitions-20260630141209 deleted.
